app.title: Swim Time Converter
app.tagline: Convert times between SCY, SCM, and LCM, and plan training zones.
app.metaDescription: Convert times between SCY, SCM, and LCM, and plan training zones.

generate.hint: Enter a valid time for each selected event.

disclaimer: Converted times use Classical (Colorado Timing) factors. Training zone paces are estimated from your inputs. Nothing here is official or a substitute for your coach's guidance.

timeEntry.heading: Enter {{course}} times
timeEntry.emptyHint: Select at least one event above to enter times.

results.heading: Converted times
results.caption: Converted event times across SCY, SCM, and LCM.

share.copyLinkAria: Copy shareable link to this training plan
share.copyFailed: Could not copy. Select and copy this link:
share.invalidBanner: This link is incomplete or invalid. Enter a goal time below.
share.hint: Anyone with this link can see your goal time and training paces.

plan.cardSubtitle: Enter your race goal to generate personalized training zones.
plan.zoneNamingHint: Match the system your coach or club uses.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.hint: The app hit an unexpected error. Reload and try again.
